name: TrustScoreAgent
description: Free reputation registry for AI microservices. Check reliability before calling any service.

skills.name: Check service reputation
skills.description: Returns trust score (0-1), confidence, and metrics for any microservice DID. Use this BEFORE calling any untrusted service to verify its reliability.

skills.name: Submit service rating
skills.description: Rate a microservice after calling it. Accepts technical metrics and optional receipt.
